cibil_score.label: CIBIL / Credit Score
cibil_score.description: Your credit score as reported by CIBIL
cibil_score.action_tip: Pay all EMIs on time for 6–12 months to improve your score

dti_ratio.label: Debt-to-Income Ratio
dti_ratio.description: Total monthly EMI obligations as a fraction of income
dti_ratio.action_tip: Close existing loans or request a smaller loan amount

employment_tenure_days.label: Employment Stability
employment_tenure_days.description: Duration at current employer or in current business
employment_tenure_days.action_tip: Continue in your current role; stability improves over time

days_past_due.label: Overdue Payment History
days_past_due.description: Days overdue on most recent loan or credit card

monthly_income.label: Monthly Income
monthly_income.action_tip: Consider adding a co-applicant with income

loan_amount.label: Loan Amount Requested
loan_amount.action_tip: Reducing the loan amount improves approval chances

loan_to_income.label: Loan-to-Income Multiple
loan_to_income.description: Loan amount as a multiple of monthly income
loan_to_income.action_tip: Request a lower amount relative to your income

bounced_cheques_12m.label: Bounced Cheques (12 months)
bounced_cheques_12m.description: Number of returned/bounced cheques in the past year
bounced_cheques_12m.action_tip: Maintain sufficient balance to avoid cheque bounces

balance_volatility.label: Balance Stability
balance_volatility.description: Variability in bank account balance over 6 months

credit_enquiries_6m.label: Recent Credit Enquiries
credit_enquiries_6m.description: Hard credit pulls in the last 6 months
credit_enquiries_6m.action_tip: Avoid applying for multiple loans simultaneously

credit_utilization.label: Credit Card Utilization
credit_utilization.description: Fraction of available credit card limit being used

credit_history_years.label: Credit History Length
credit_history_years.description: Years since first credit account was opened
credit_history_years.action_tip: Credit history length improves naturally over time

net_monthly_surplus.label: Monthly Surplus
net_monthly_surplus.description: Income remaining after all existing and proposed EMIs
net_monthly_surplus.action_tip: Reduce existing EMI burden or add a co-applicant

model_notes: LightGBM binary classifier. Positive class = loan approved.
